titleStmt.title: SII 7.50: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 50. (A.R. No. 47 of 1900). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE LAKSHMINARASIMHA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śvasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Irācādhi rācaṉ Irācaparamecuraṉ śrīvīra Accutatevama hāirāyar pri tivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 6- ṉ melcellāniṉṟa man matasamvatsa rattu riṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tuvādeśi yum soma vāramum peṟṟa Iṟṟai ṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu cantirakiri Irācciyattu Opācci Ammaṉcamuttirattu Opuḷeśva ran
caṉṉatiil vetapārāyaṇampaṇṇa kavucikakottirattu cattiāṣāṭa cūttirattu nālūr cīraṅkarācar putra r Ārāvamutāḻvāṟku kiṣṇaveṇitīrattile Iṣapaṉāyaṟṟu tuvāteci puṇṇiyakālattile cuvāmi Accutayatevamakāirāyar Ammaṉ Opācciyammaṉukku puṇṇiyamāka Opācciyammaṉcamuttiram śrīopuḷeśva raṉ caṉṉatiyile vetapārāyaṇam paṇṇikkoṇṭuvarukiṟattu
kku kaṭṭaḷaiiṭṭa koyilukku teṟke Āṟṟukkālukku teṟku pālāṟṟukku vaṭakku tūcivaḻikku kiḻakku Itukkuḷḷe Irunūṟṟukkuḻi māniyamum Opuḷe- śva raṉ koyilile Oru taḷikai pra cātamum vakaikkoru tiruppaṇiyāramum Aṭaikkāyamutu Añcu pākkum pattu veṟṟilaiyum mātam nālu palam cāttuppaṭi cantaṇamum Ācantiṟātiddha tākiāka koṇṭu putra pavutra p parampara
yāka tāṉātivi(y)kkiṟaiyaṅkaḷukkum yokkiyamākakaṭavutākavum caṉṉatitteruvile Oru maṉai muppattāṟaṭiyile Oru maṉaiyum Aṉupavittu Ācantiṟā[ rkastā- kiāy] Aṉupavittukkoṇṭirukkakkaṭavarākavum . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāśreyonupālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanādaccyutam padam . svadattādviguṇam pu(ṇ)ṇyam pa ra[dattā*]nupālanam .
Digital edition of SII 7.50 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
